title: Claude Code v2.1.141
summary: terminalSequence field in hook JSON for desktop notifications/window titles; CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_PREFER_HTTPS for HTTPS plugin cloning; ANTHROPIC_WORKSPACE_ID env var; claude agents --cwd; amber spinner after 10s; 40+ bug fixes

title: Claude Code v2.1.140
summary: Improved Agent tool subagent_type matching (case- and separator-insensitive); updated agent color palette; fixed /goal hanging when disableAllHooks set; fixed background service startup on enterprise endpoint security machines

title: Claude Code v2.1.139
summary: Agent View (Research Preview): claude agents command for unified session list; /goal command for completion conditions; /scroll-speed; claude plugin details; transcript navigation (?, {} shortcuts); hook args field; continueOnBlock for PostToolUse; 50+ fixes

title: Introducing Claude for Small Business
summary: 15 ready-made agentic workflows; connectors for QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365. Road tour starting May 14 Chicago — free half-day AI fluency workshop for 100 SMB leaders per stop

title: Anthropic and Amazon expand collaboration for up to 5 gigawatts of new compute
summary: Anthropic and Amazon expand compute partnership to secure up to 5 gigawatts of capacity for training and deploying Claude models. Largest compute deal in Anthropic history.

title: Anthropic in Talks to Raise $30 Billion at $900 Billion Valuation
summary: Anthropic is in early talks with investors to raise at least $30 billion in fresh financing at a valuation of more than $900 billion. Company's run-rate revenue has surpassed $30 billion.

title: Introducing Cline SDK: the upgraded agent runtime
summary: @cline/sdk open-source agent runtime rebuilt from scratch, powers all Cline surfaces; available for teams to build on. 7M+ developer install base migrating to SDK. CLI and Kanban already on SDK; VS Code and JetBrains in migration.

title: Cursor 2.5 security vulnerability patched — arbitrary code execution via Git repos
summary: A flaw in Cursor has been fixed in version 2.5. The vulnerability allowed arbitrary code execution through maliciously crafted Git repositories. No public signs of in-the-wild exploitation.
